notes: Germany are without confirmed absentees Serge Gnabry (adductor tear), Lennart Karl (torn muscle, replaced by Ouédraogo), Ridle Baku, and Jonathan Burkardt (all injured), while Manuel Neuer carries a calf concern but is expected to start; Curaçao are close to full strength with only Riechedly Bazoer ruled out through injury.
home_scorers: Kai Havertz (leading striker, expected starter in attack)
Florian Wirtz (attacking midfielder, set-piece and through-ball threat)
away_scorers: Tahith Chong (standout attacker, three goals in first six caps)
Leandro Bacuna (captain, experienced midfielder, set-piece threat)
Juninho Bacuna (central midfielder, goal threat from midfield)
